name: Pineapple Cream Pie
recipeIngredient: 1 cup pineapple, #2 can crushed with skin and drained
2 teaspoons unflavored gelatin mixed with 3 tablespoons cold water (let thicken)
recipeInstructions:
1. Combine 1/2 cup sugar with pineapple juice and slightly beaten egg yolks.
Cook over very low heat until the sugar is completely dissolved and the custard coats a spoon. Do not allow to boil; just simmer.
2. Stir continuously while cooking. Add gelatin mixture to the hot custard and keep stirring constantly until completely melted.
3. Remove from heat and pour into a large bowl. Add strained crushed pineapple to the hot custard and blend well.
4. Beat egg whites until they just cling to the bowl, then add the remaining 1/2 cup sugar. Beat only until blended.
5. Pour the beaten egg mixture into the hot custard in one direction and fold until well combined.
6. Pour into a cold baked pie shell. Let stand until cool, then refrigerate for several hours until chilled.
7. Whip 1 cup whipping cream and spread over the pie.
